hero.title: Your restaurant in Telegram and MAX. No aggregators

points: Accept, cancel orders and refund customers
Assigns courier to order — courier receives it with no extra steps

aiSearch.title: Smart AI-powered menu search for customers

points: AI understands natural language queries
Search by taste, ingredients and dish description

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From bot creation to first order — one day
howItWorks.subtitle: No lengthy development. Everything is configured through CRM without developers

steps.title: Create a bot
steps.description: Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather or a MAX bot in the partner panel. Takes 10 minutes

steps.title: Set up in CRM
steps.description: Add your bot token to CRM, add menu, set delivery zones and configure payment via YooKassa

steps.title: Share the link
steps.description: Post the bot link on social media, website, or QR code in your venue — customers start ordering

steps.title: Receive orders
steps.description: Orders come into CRM and Crew app. Courier gets the task, customer gets a notification at every status

comparison.label: Comparison

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent prices with no hidden fees
pricing.subtitle: Fixed payment. One plan — all features without functional limits
pricing.limits: Up to {{bots}} bots · Up to {{stores}} locations · Up to {{items}} menu items
pricing.registrationHint: Clicking «Connect» will open the CRM. Complete registration, go to «License» section and pay for the selected plan — then you are ready to start
pricing.customSubtitle: If standard limits aren't enough — contact us and we'll find the perfect solution for your business

items.question: Do customers need to install an app?
items.answer: No. The mini-app opens directly in Telegram or MAX — messengers already installed on most users' phones. No additional installation required

items.question: Is there integration with iiko or R-Keeper?
items.answer: Currently there is no direct integration with POS systems. Nyambot works as a standalone platform: menu, orders, customers and delivery are managed through our CRM

items.question: Can I connect multiple locations?
items.answer: Yes. You can connect up to 22 locations in one account. Each location is configured independently: its own menu, hours, delivery zones and payment settings

items.question: How does order payment work?
items.answer: Online card payment via YooKassa can be connected for all locations at once or selectively. Customers pay directly in the messenger. Cash on delivery is also supported

items.question: What is a MAX bot and do I need it?
items.answer: MAX is a Russian messenger from Mail.ru with a growing audience. Nyambot is one of the first services with full MAX support. Connection is optional but allows reaching additional audience at no extra cost

items.question: How does the trial period work?
items.answer: After registration, a 7-day free trial with all features is available. No card required. After the trial, choose a suitable plan

items.question: Can Nyambot be used without couriers?
items.answer: Yes. You can set up pickup only or dine-in service. The Crew app and courier module are included in the plan but optional

items.question: How quickly can I start accepting orders?
items.answer: With a bot ready — within one day. You need to create a bot, connect it in CRM, add the menu and share the link with customers

cta.title: Start accepting orders today
cta.subtitle: 7 days free. Telegram and MAX. No aggregators and no commissions
cta.hint: No card required · Free trial, no commitment

footer.description: Platform for restaurants and cafes. Orders via Telegram and MAX without aggregators
